name: @borjie/persistent-memory
description: Persistent Memory + Skill Library (Wave 18GG) — temporal-continuity substrate so Mr. Mwikila never forgets across crashes, restarts, sessions, days, weeks, or months. Four tiers (working / short-term / long-term / consolidated), procedural skill library (Voyager-style), cross-session resumeable threads, MemGPT-style summarisation, and an anti-amnesia checkpoint contract.
